name: gemini-toolkit
description: Unified Car Rental Fleet Operations Platform — Shifts, Washers, Cases

scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute gemini-toolkit-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_foundation.sql && wrangler d1 execute gemini-toolkit-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_operations.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute gemini-toolkit-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_foundation.sql && wrangler d1 execute gemini-toolkit-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_operations.sql
